entry.title: 在JSP中使用Java代码给hidden域赋值的BUG , JSON中的双引号变成了问号
entry.content: 此BUG在低版本IE中已重现，非IE主流浏览器可能没有这个问题。 假设后台给前台传了一些JSON数据，前台hidden域中的值通过request对象获取。 1<input type='hidden' value="<%= StringUtils.trimToEmpty(request.getArrtribute('tempJsonStr'))%>"> 当使用Java代码来给hidden域赋值的时候，并且使用的是双引号则会引起数据格式错乱的BUG（json字符串中的双引号变成了问好（？）） ​ 不正常的效果如下： 1<input value=[{ type=hidden name=etpsSplAprvJsonStr ?,?permitItemGb?:?B20?,?primaryKey?:?625?,?sequenceNo?:?-140?,?sequenceNoName?:?NET_SEQ_ETPS_SPL_APRV?,?spclTrdId?:?111000?,?spclTrdName?:??,?tempId?:??,?validDateFrom?:??,?validDateTo?:??}]? appNo?:?00000001201711035001?,?apprvDate?:??,?apprvFileNo?:??,?apprvNo?:?-140?,?apprvOrgan?:??,?apprvRank?:??,?apprvResult?:??,?areaId?:??,?bulletinDate?:??,?compp?:{?appNo?:?00000001201711035001?,?apprvNo?:?-140?},?confirmedResult?:??,?etpsId?:??,?etpsPmtGbBoSet?:[{?appNo?:?00000001201711035001?,?apprvDate?:??,?apprvNo?:?-140?,?apprvRank?:??,?apprvResult?:??,?areaId?:??,?compp?:{?appNo?:?00000001201711035001?,?apprvNo?:?-140?},?confirmedResult?:??,?etpsId?:??,?id?:?5?,?permitDept?:?lllll?,?permitFileNo?:?lllll?,?permitFileStatus?:?1?,?permitFileType?:?B02?,?permitNo?:?1007?,?primaryKey?:?5?,?sequenceNo?:?-140?,?sequenceNoName?:?SEQ_ETPS_PMT_GB?,?tempId?:??,?validDateFrom?:{?date?:?28?,?day?:?2?,?hours?:?19?,?minutes?:?11?,?month?:?10?,?nanos?:?973000000?,?seconds?:?18?,?time?:?1511867478973?,?timezoneOffset?:?-480?,?year?:?117?},?validDateTo?:{?date?:?28?,?day?:?2?,?hours?:?19?,?minutes?:?11?,?month?:?10?,?nanos?:?927000000?,?seconds?:?18?,?time?:?1511867478927?,?timezoneOffset?:?-480?,?year?:?117?}}],?id?:?625?,?memo?:??,?permitBusi?:?lllll> 解决方法： ​ 在使用Java代码给hidden域赋值的时候使用单引号即可解决，例如： 1<input type='hidden' value='<%= StringUtils.trimToEmpty(request.getArrtribute("tempJsonStr"))%>'> ​ 以下是更改过后正常的数据： 12345<input value='[{"appNo":"00000001201711035001","apprvFileNo":"","apprvNo":"-140","apprvOrgan":"","apprvRank":"","apprvResult":"","areaId":"","compp":{"appNo":"00000001201711035001","apprvNo":"-140"},"confirmedResult":"","etpsId":"","etpsPmtGbBoSet":[{"appNo":"00000001201711035001","apprvDate":"","apprvNo":"-140","apprvRank":"","apprvResult":"","areaId":"","compp":{"appNo":"00000001201711035001","apprvNo":"-140"},"confirmedResult":"","etpsId":"","id":"5","permitDept":"lllll","permitFileNo":"lllll","permitFileStatus":"1","permitFileType":"B02","permitNo":"1007","primaryKey":"5","sequenceNo":"-140","sequenceNoName":"SEQ_ETPS_PMT_GB","tempId":"","validDateFrom":{"date":"28","day":"2","hours":"19","minutes":"11","month":"10","nanos":"973000000","seconds":"18","time":"1511867478973","timezoneOffset":"-480","year":"117"},"validDateTo":{"date":"28","day":"2","hours":"19","minutes":"11","month":"10","nanos":"927000000","seconds":"18","time":"1511867478927","timezoneOffset":"-480","year":"117"}}],"id":"625","memo":"","permitBusi":"llll","permitItemGb":"B20","primaryKey":"625","sequenceNo":"-140","sequenceNoName":"NET_SEQ_ETPS_SPL_APRV","spclTrdId":"111000","spclTrdName":"","tempId":"","validDateFrom":"","validDateTo":""}]' type=hidden name=etpsSplAprvJsonStr>
